query:
-- 删除之前创建的港口属性
DELETE FROM attributes WHERE category = 'shipping_port';

-- 插入新的4个港口（使用camelCase字段名）
INSERT INTO attributes (category, fieldName, name, displayOrder, erpCompanyId, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('shipping_port', 'shipping_port', '天津港', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('shipping_port', 'shipping_port', '上海港', 2, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('shipping_port', 'shipping_port', '宁波港', 3, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('shipping_port', 'shipping_port', '深圳港', 4, 1, NOW(), NOW());

-- 验证插入结果
SELECT * FROM attributes WHERE category = 'shipping_port' ORDER BY displayOrder;
